THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGVINENKO, SERGUEI $8,260.34 PRINCIPAL, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $322.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,758.24, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF SEEKING AND RECORDING ABSTRACTS, RENEWING ENFORCMENT OF JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF WILL NOT SEEK A WRIT OR TAKE ANY OTHER STEPS TO ENFORCE THE JUDGMENT AS LONG AS DEFENDANT MAINTAINS PAYMENTS AS SET IN THE STIPULATION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
